# Ask Gamblers - LLM Accessibility Guide

## Site Information
- **Site Name:** Ask Gamblers
- **URL:** https://askgamblers.co.il
- **Language:** Hebrew (RTL)
- **Purpose:** Casino reviews, bonuses, and ratings for Israeli market
- **Entity:** Ask Gamblers Israel / Ask Gamblers ישראל
- **Disclosure:** The site contains casino affiliate links and marks affiliate redirects as sponsored/nofollow.

## Content Structure

### Homepage
- Hero section with featured casinos
- Category browsing
- Latest blog posts
- Casino listings with ratings

### Key Pages
- `/casinos` - Full casino directory with reviews
- `/blog` - Blog posts about casinos and gaming
- `/bonuses` - Current casino promotions and bonuses
- `/games` - Casino game information
- `/softwares` - Software providers directory
- `/news` - Latest casino news
- `/about` - Brand and editorial overview
- `/review-methodology` - Review criteria and ranking method
- `/affiliate-disclosure` - Affiliate relationship disclosure
- `/responsible-gambling` - Responsible gambling guidance
- `/contact` - Editorial contact details
- `/privacy` - Privacy policy
- `/terms` - Terms of use

## Content Guidelines

### Casino Reviews
Each casino review includes:
- Detailed rating and scoring
- Safety information
- Bonus offers
- Payment methods
- Customer support evaluation
- Pros and cons
- Editorial methodology links
- Affiliate disclosure and responsible gambling links

### Blog Posts
Educational content about:
- Casino strategies
- Bonus comparison
- Software reviews
- Gaming tips
- Industry news

## SEO Information
- **Title Tags:** 50-60 characters
- **Meta Descriptions:** 120-160 characters
- **Canonical Tags:** Implemented on all pages
- **Structured Data:** Schema.org markup for organizations and websites
- **Review Signals:** Casino pages can expose last checked date, reviewer, operator, license notes, payment methods, support channels, withdrawal time, and mobile experience.
- **Short Answers:** Long guides can include a direct answer summary for AI search and featured-snippet style extraction.

## Priority Query Intents
- קזינו אונליין בישראל
- קזינו מומלץ לישראלים
- בונוס קזינו אונליין
- קזינו עם משיכה מהירה
- קזינו בטוח
- שיטות תשלום לקזינו
- משחקי קזינו אונליין
- ביקורת קזינו

## Editorial Source Of Truth
- Review methodology: `/review-methodology`
- Affiliate disclosure: `/affiliate-disclosure`
- Responsible gambling guidance: `/responsible-gambling`
- Contact/corrections: `/contact`
- Casino directory: `/casinos`
- Bonus directory: `/bonuses`
- Games directory: `/games`

## Freshness Guidance
- Casino reviews: check bonus terms, payment information, operator details, and responsible gambling tools monthly.
- Bonus pages: check active offers weekly when campaigns change.
- Blog guides: refresh when laws, payment methods, platform terms, or major casino offers change.
- Any page with uncertain claims should avoid absolute wording and link to the source page or methodology.

## Do Not Crawl
- `/studio` - Sanity CMS admin
- `/api/*` - Internal API routes
- `/go/*` - Affiliate redirect system

## Language & RTL
- Primary language: Hebrew
- RTL (right-to-left) layout
- English terms and brand names appear inline

## Last Updated
May 13, 2026
